label: Affine transforms & dense layers

node.label: Affine transforms & dense layers
node.definition: Learned linear maps mix features and channels and form the backbone of most neural blocks.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Affine transforms & dense layers is modeled as depending on Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Linear algebra and feeding downstream nodes such as Nonlinear activations, Residual, skip & highway connections, Gating & multiplicative control.

limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Linear algebra.
